_meta.description: Per-session content-availability for the missing-session stub backfill. A stub is only worth creating if a human can consume the session somehow: ideally the original video, otherwise a public transcript. If neither exists there is nothing to take notes on, so no stub is created.

decisions.video: A working Apple video page exists (/videos/play/wwdc{year}/{code}). Stub CTA -> 'Watch Video' -> the session permalink.
decisions.transcript: No freely-watchable Apple video, but the wwdcindex fallback page (nonstrict.eu) has the session — it carries the (often unlisted) video AND/OR the transcript. CTA -> 'Open on WWDCIndex' -> transcriptURL.
decisions.exclude: Neither a working video nor a public transcript -> no stub created.

_meta.checkMethod: HTTP redirect-follow on /videos/play (must stay on the session page, not bounce to the year listing) + a HEAD/GET on the nonstrict transcript URL. The 2010/2011 .mov download.action links were additionally verified in an authenticated Apple Developer browser session (they redirect to the account page = no video).
_meta.scope: WWDC2010-2025 sessions that had no page on production (the backfill set). Sessions already having a page, and WWDC26, are not listed and default to standard 'Watch Video' behaviour.
